---
title: "05: Condition-wise DEGs and GSEA for Stromal Subset"
output:
  github_document:
    html_preview: false
---

## R Libraries

```{r libraries, results=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(openxlsx)
library(stringr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(msigdbr)
library(readxl)
```

---

## DEGs for All Cluster Combined

```{r degs_overall, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(2024)

stromal_subset <- readRDS("RDS/stromal_subset_umap_8_clusters.RDS")
Idents(stromal_subset) <- "condition"
stromal_subset <- JoinLayers(stromal_subset)

pairwise_comparisons <- list(
  c("CAR-T Enterocolitis", "CAR-T Control"),
  c("CAR-T Enterocolitis", "NV"),
  c("CAR-T Control",       "NV")
)

overall_markers_list <- list()

for (cmp in pairwise_comparisons) {
  ident1 <- cmp[1]
  ident2 <- cmp[2]

  if (!all(c(ident1, ident2) %in% unique(Idents(stromal_subset)))) next
  message("Overall DEGs: ", ident1, " vs ", ident2)

  data.markers <- FindMarkers(
    stromal_subset,
    ident.1         = ident1,
    ident.2         = ident2,
    only.pos        = FALSE,
    min.pct         = 0.25,
    logfc.threshold = 0.25,
    test.use = "wilcox"
  )

  data.markers$gene      <- rownames(data.markers)
  rownames(data.markers) <- NULL
  data.markers           <- data.markers[, c("gene", setdiff(colnames(data.markers), "gene"))]
  data.markers$cluster   <- "all"

  list_name <- paste0("all_", ident1, "_vs_", ident2)
  overall_markers_list[[list_name]] <- data.markers

  write.csv(
    data.markers,
    file = paste0("csvs/condition_DEGs/cluster_wise/stromal_subset_all_",
                  ident1, "_vs_", ident2, ".csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```

---

## Per Subcluster DEGs

```{r degs_per_subcluster, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(2024)

stromal_subset <- readRDS("RDS/stromal_subset_umap_8_clusters.RDS")
DefaultAssay(stromal_subset) <- "RNA"
Idents(stromal_subset)       <- "cluster_label"
stromal_subset$subcluster    <- Idents(stromal_subset)
stromal_subset <- JoinLayers(stromal_subset)

markers_list <- list()

for (cluster in unique(stromal_subset$subcluster)) {
  message("Processing subcluster: ", cluster)

  subcluster_data    <- subset(stromal_subset, subset = subcluster == cluster)
  Idents(subcluster_data) <- "condition"

  for (cmp in pairwise_comparisons) {
    ident1 <- cmp[1]
    ident2 <- cmp[2]

    if (!all(c(ident1, ident2) %in% unique(Idents(subcluster_data)))) {
      message("  Skipping: ", ident1, " vs ", ident2, " (missing condition in ", cluster, ")")
      next
    }

    message("  Comparing: ", ident1, " vs ", ident2)

    markers <- FindMarkers(
      subcluster_data,
      ident.1         = ident1,
      ident.2         = ident2,
      only.pos = FALSE,
      min.pct = 0.25,
      logfc.threshold = 0.25,
      test.use = "wilcox"
    )

    markers$cluster    <- cluster
    markers$comparison <- paste0(ident1, "_vs_", ident2)
    markers$gene       <- rownames(markers)

    list_name <- paste0("stromal_subset_cluster_", cluster, "_", ident1, "_vs_", ident2)
    markers_list[[list_name]] <- markers
  }
}

# Save per-cluster CSV files
for (name in names(markers_list)) {
  write.csv(
    markers_list[[name]],
    file      = paste0("csvs/condition_DEGs/cluster_wise/", name, ".csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```

## Gene Sets

```{r gene_sets, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(2024)

human_gobp_sets     <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "C5", subcollection = "GO:BP")
human_kegg_sets     <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "C2", subcollection = "CP:KEGG_LEGACY")
human_reactome_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME")

human_gene_sets <- rbind(human_gobp_sets, human_kegg_sets, human_reactome_sets)
```

```{r gsea_wrapper, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# GSEA wrapper
gsea_human <- function(df) {
  lfc_vector <- setNames(df$avg_log2FC, df$gene)
  lfc_vector <- sort(lfc_vector, decreasing = TRUE)

  clusterProfiler::GSEA(
    geneList     = lfc_vector,
    TERM2GENE    = human_gene_sets[, c("gs_name", "gene_symbol")],
    minGSSize    = 5,
    maxGSSize    = 500,
    pvalueCutoff = 1,
    eps          = 0,
    verbose      = FALSE
  )
}
```

## GSEA Per Subcluster


```{r run_gsea,  message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
csv_dir  <- "csvs/condition_DEGs/cluster_wise"
gsea_dir <- "csvs/condition_GSEA/"
dir.create(gsea_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (cmp in pairwise_comparisons) {
  cond1 <- cmp[1]; cond2 <- cmp[2]
  message("GSEA: ", cond1, " vs ", cond2)

  csv_files <- list.files(
    csv_dir,
    pattern   = paste0(cond1, "_vs_", cond2, "\\.csv$"),
    full.names = TRUE
  )

  all_gsea_results <- list()

  for (csv_path in csv_files) {
      subcluster_name <- sub(paste0("^stromal_subset_(.+?)_", cond1, "_vs_", cond2, "$"), "\\1", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(csv_path)))
    df <- read.csv(csv_path)

    if (!("gene" %in% colnames(df)) || nrow(df) < 10) {
      warning("Skipping: ", subcluster_name)
      next
    }

    gsea_res <- gsea_human(df)
    res_df   <- gsea_res@result
    res_df$subcluster <- subcluster_name
    all_gsea_results[[subcluster_name]] <- res_df
  }

  if (length(all_gsea_results) > 0) {
    write.xlsx(
      do.call(rbind, all_gsea_results),
      file = file.path(gsea_dir, paste0("stromal_subset_GSEA_", cond1, "_vs_", cond2, ".xlsx"))
    )
  }
}
```

## GSEA Dot Plots

```{r gsea_dotplots, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_nes_dotplot <- function(gsea_df, subcluster, cond1, cond2, top_n = 15) {
  subcluster_clean <- sub("^cluster_", "", subcluster)
  sig <- gsea_df %>% filter(qvalue < 0.05)

  if (nrow(sig) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() +
             annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0,
                      label = paste0("No significant pathways\n", subcluster_clean,
                                     "\n", cond1, " vs ", cond2)) +
             theme_void())
  }

  plot_df <- bind_rows(
    sig %>% filter(NES > 0) %>% arrange(desc(NES)) %>% head(top_n),
    sig %>% filter(NES < 0) %>% arrange(NES)       %>% head(top_n)
  ) %>%
    mutate(Description = factor(Description, levels = Description[order(NES)]))

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = NES, y = Description, size = setSize, color = qvalue)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "navy", high = "firebrick", trans = "reverse",
                         name = "Adj. p-value") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Gene set size", range = c(2, 8)) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(subcluster_clean, " (", cond1, " vs ", cond2, ")"),
      x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)", y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7), plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
}
```

```{r gsea_display_loop, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gsea_dir <- "csvs/condition_GSEA/"

for (cmp in pairwise_comparisons) {
  cond1 <- cmp[1]; cond2 <- cmp[2]

  gsea_file <- file.path(gsea_dir,
                         paste0("stromal_subset_GSEA_", cond1, "_vs_", cond2, ".xlsx"))
  combined_results <- as.data.frame(read_excel(gsea_file))
  clusters         <- unique(combined_results$subcluster)

  plots_by_cluster <- list()
  for (clust in clusters) {
    gsea_df <- combined_results %>% filter(subcluster == clust)
    plots_by_cluster[[clust]] <- list(
      dot = plot_nes_dotplot(gsea_df, clust, cond1, cond2)
    )
  }

  cat("## ", cond1, " vs ", cond2, " {.tabset}\n\n")

  for (name in names(plots_by_cluster)) {
    subcluster_clean <- sub("^cluster_", "", name)
    cat("### ", subcluster_clean, " {.tabset}\n\n")

    cat("#### NES Dot Plot\n\n")
    print(plots_by_cluster[[name]]$dot)
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```
